title: Syncc Executive Agent OS
excerpt: A production-grade multi-agent AI platform enabling enterprise autonomous task execution with human-in-the-loop oversight and AI Gateway routing.
overview: A production-grade multi-agent AI platform enabling enterprise autonomous task execution. Integrates LangChain orchestration, MCP servers, n8n automation, and vector retrieval, with configurable human-in-the-loop oversight, behavioral governance, and AI Gateway routing for cost and latency control.

title: RAG Document Q&A Pipeline
excerpt: A retrieval-augmented generation pipeline for high-fidelity enterprise knowledge extraction, built with a DeepEval-based evaluation framework.
overview: A retrieval-augmented generation pipeline for high-fidelity enterprise knowledge extraction, built with a DeepEval-based evaluation framework. Implements OpenAI embeddings, cosine-similarity search, and tuned chunking strategies for accurate, grounded document Q&A.
architectureMarkdown:

title: Structured Data Extraction Pipeline
excerpt: An MLOps-style pipeline that turns unstructured inputs into governed, schema-validated data outputs on AWS Lambda with Terraform IaC.
overview: An MLOps-style pipeline that turns unstructured inputs into governed, schema-validated data outputs. Runs on AWS Lambda with Terraform infrastructure-as-code, automated quality controls, and CI/CD deployment — analogous to production data-orchestration patterns.
architectureMarkdown:

title: MCP Enterprise Integration Layer
excerpt: An integration layer built on the MCP server protocol connecting AI agents to Notion, Jira, ClickUp, and Confluence with governed access and audit logging.
overview: An integration layer built on the MCP server protocol that connects AI agents to Notion, Jira, ClickUp, and Confluence — enabling cross-system agentic orchestration with governed data access and full audit logging.
